====Pokémon====
This listing is for Winona's Pokémon in the [[Pokémon Adventures]] manga.
{{anchor|Altaria 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Winona
|gender=female
|pkmn=Altaria
|type1=Dragon
|type2=Flying
|img=Winona Altaria Adventures.png
|epnum=PS211
|epname=Hanging Around With Slaking III
|desc={{p|Altaria}} is Winona's first known Pokémon. She was first seen being used to fly to [[Norman]] and tell him to return to his Gym. Later, she faced {{adv|Sapphire}}'s {{p|Combusken}}, [[Chic]], in a Gym battle. Despite her Evolution into {{p|Blaziken}}, it wasn't enough to defeat Altaria and was defeated. During the {{p|Groudon}} and {{p|Kyogre}} crisis, Altaria was used to battle [[Matt]] and easily managed to defeat him.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Winona
|gender=female
|pkmn=Masquerain
|type1=Bug
|type2=Flying
|img=Winona Masquerain Adventures.png
|epnum=PS231
|epname=Master Class with Masquerain
|desc={{p|Masquerain}} is Winona's second known Pokémon. She was first seen being used to train with {{adv|Sapphire}}. She was defeated by an {{m|Aerial Ace}} attack from Sapphire's {{p|Tropius}}, [[Troppy]], giving Sapphire the win. During the {{p|Groudon}} and {{p|Kyogre}} crisis, a tidal wave nearly hit Winona and Sapphire. Masquerain was used to block the wave, but Sapphire's {{p|Relicanth}}, Relly, saved them instead.

Masquerain's known moves are {{m|Stun Spore}} and {{m|Silver Wind}}, and her Ability is {{a|Intimidate}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Winona
|pkmn=Beautifly
|type1=Bug
|type2=Flying
|img=Winona Beautifly Adventures.png
|epnum=PS231
|epname=Master Class with Masquerain
|desc={{p|Beautifly}} is Winona's third known Pokémon. It was first seen being used to train with {{adv|Sapphire}}. It was defeated by an {{m|Aerial Ace}} attack from Sapphire's {{p|Donphan}}, Phado, giving Sapphire the win.

Beautifly's only known move is {{m|Whirlwind}}, and its Ability is {{a|Swarm}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Winona
|gender=female
|pkmn=Swablu
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Winona Swablu Adventures.png
|epnum=PS231
|epname=Master Class with Masquerain
|desc={{p|Swablu}} is Winona's fourth known Pokémon. She was first seen being used to train with {{adv|Sapphire}}. She was defeated by a {{m|Rock Tomb}} attack from Sapphire's {{p|Lairon}}, [[Rono]], giving Sapphire the win.

Swablu's only known move is {{m|Fury Attack}}, and her Ability is {{a|Natural Cure}}.}}

{{anchor|Skarmory 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Winona
|pkmn=Skarmory
|type1=Steel
|type2=Flying
|img=Winona Skarmory Adventures.png
|epnum=PS245
|epname=Bravo, Vibrava
|desc={{p|Skarmory}} is Winona's fifth known Pokémon. It was first used to battle [[Matt]] during the {{p|Groudon}} and {{p|Kyogre}} crisis.

Skarmory's known moves are {{m|Metal Sound}} and {{m|Air Cutter}}.}}
